title: prunus persica var. platycarpa
intro: Prunus persica var. platycarpa, also known as the flat peach or plate peach, is a variety of peach tree that produces flat, oval fruits with a sweet flavor and soft texture. The medicinal properties of Prunus persica var. platycarpa include its ability to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation, due to its high fiber content and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of consuming Prunus persica var. platycarpa include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving digestion, and providing essential vitamins and minerals such as vitamin C and potassium. Prunus persica var. platycarpa can be prepared as herbal tea, infusion, or juice, which can be consumed on its own or used as a base for other herbal remedies.
